title: Ability to edit an Update in mobile
excerpt: An Update created via a browser cannot be edited via mobile app. Perhaps also the other way too?!

posts.author: MatthewTippett (Matthew Tippett)
posts.cookedHtml: An Update created via a browser cannot be edited via mobile app. Perhaps also the other way too?!

posts.author: mharding7va (Michael Harding)
posts.cookedHtml: There is no way to update comments/update on mobile iOS. Therefore store in an update that needs to changed later won’t work. I also can use a text or long text field to store information as URL links are not clickable in text fields. URL fields won’t work because one item my have several URLs.
